# DKBFM

> High-end custom web development and technical SEO studio.

DKBFM builds custom-engineered websites and handles technical SEO end to end — search architecture, performance, and digital presence. No site builders, no templates. The studio works on a project-by-project basis and selects engagements rather than running an open sales funnel.

## Services
- High-end custom web development (no templates, no site builders)
- Technical SEO & search architecture
- Digital presence & performance optimization

## Contact
- Email: founder@dkbfm.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/harinsky
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gtatarnikov

## Notes for crawlers
This is a single-page site (https://dkbfm.com/). All content lives on the homepage; there are no additional indexable pages at this time.
